headline: Wells Fargo Lowers Monster Beverage (MNST) Price Target to $90
summary: Monster Beverage Corporation (NASDAQ:MNST) is one of the 15 Set-It-and-Forget-It Stocks to Buy in 2026. On March 16, 2026, Monster Beverage Corporation (NASDAQ:MNST)’s price target from Wells Fargo was lowered from $94 to $90. Wells Fargo analyst kept an Overweight rating on the stock. The firm maintains a positive outlook on Monster Beverage Corporation (NASDAQ:MNST) […]

headline: Monster Beverage Record Sales Highlight Global Growth And Valuation Questions
summary: Monster Beverage (NasdaqGS:MNST) reports record quarterly net sales, with fourth quarter revenue surpassing US$2b for the first time. Growth is described as especially strong in international markets, with the EMEA region a key contributor. The results highlight the scale of global demand for energy drinks and the company’s expanding reach outside the US. Monster Beverage, known for its flagship energy drink portfolio, sits at the center of a category that continues to attract consumer...
